#### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server](index.md 'index')

## Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Actors Namespace

| Classes | |
| :--- | :--- |
| [ActorStateMachine](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Actors.ActorStateMachine.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Actors\.ActorStateMachine') | Checkpoints pipeline stages in actor state for crash\-recovery resume \(NFR25\)\. Created per\-actor\-call \(same pattern as IdempotencyChecker, EventPersister\)\. All writes use SetStateAsync \(staging\) \-\- the caller \(AggregateActor\) commits atomically with SaveStateAsync to ensure checkpoint \+ events are atomic \(AC \#9\)\. |
| [AggregateActor](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Actors.AggregateActor.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Actors\.AggregateActor') | Aggregate actor \-\- thin orchestrator for command processing\. Story 3\.2: Implements 5\-step delegation pipeline\. Steps 1\-4 \(idempotency, tenant validation, state rehydration, domain invocation\) are real\. Step 5: Event persistence \(Story 3\.7\)\. Step 5b: Snapshot creation \(Story 3\.9\)\. Story 3\.10: Step 3 now loads snapshot FIRST, passes to EventStreamReader for tail\-only reads\. Story 3\.11: Checkpointed state machine, OpenTelemetry activities, advisory status writes\. Story 4\.4: IRemindable for drain recovery of unpublished events after pub/sub outage\. Story 4\.5: Dead\-letter routing for infrastructure failures at Steps 3\-5\. SECURITY: Never use DaprClient\.QueryStateAsync or bulk state queries without explicit tenant filtering\. DAPR query API does not enforce actor state scoping\. See FR28\. SECURITY: Never bypass IActorStateManager with direct DaprClient\.GetStateAsync/SetStateAsync\. Rule \#6 exists to prevent this \-\- direct state store access bypasses actor state namespacing\. |
| [CommandProcessingResult](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Actors.CommandProcessingResult.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Actors\.CommandProcessingResult') | Result of processing a command by an aggregate actor\. |
| [IdempotencyChecker](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Actors.IdempotencyChecker.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Actors\.IdempotencyChecker') | Checks and records command idempotency using DAPR actor state\. Created per\-actor\-call \(not via DI\) because it requires the actor's IActorStateManager instance\. |
| [IdempotencyRecord](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Actors.IdempotencyRecord.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Actors\.IdempotencyRecord') | Storage\-optimized DTO for idempotency state in IActorStateManager\. Intentionally separate from [CommandProcessingResult](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Actors.CommandProcessingResult.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Actors\.CommandProcessingResult') to allow independent evolution\. |
| [PipelineState](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Actors.PipelineState.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Actors\.PipelineState') | Tracks in\-flight command lifecycle through the actor pipeline\. Persisted via IActorStateManager for crash\-recovery resume \(NFR25\)\. |
| [TenantMismatchException](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Actors.TenantMismatchException.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Actors\.TenantMismatchException') | Exception thrown when a command's tenant does not match the actor's tenant identity\. SEC\-2: Indicates a potential routing error or security violation\. |
| [TenantValidator](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Actors.TenantValidator.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Actors\.TenantValidator') | Validates that a command's tenant matches the actor's tenant identity\. SEC\-2: Defense\-in\-depth tenant isolation at actor level\. |
| [UnpublishedEventsRecord](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Actors.UnpublishedEventsRecord.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Actors\.UnpublishedEventsRecord') | Tracks unpublished events for drain recovery after publication failure\. Stored in actor state with key prefix "drain:" for automatic recovery via DAPR actor reminders \(Story 4\.4\)\. |
